summary: iter273 backend regression for Echo Help Agent LLM Q&A, Admin onboarding role auto-provisioning, Supplier Catalog deep-dive (price history + outlet usage + vendor selection), and 409A evidence PDF. 13/13 tests passed against the external preview URL.
critical_code_review_comments: admin_onboarding.py is 631 lines — past the 700-line guideline soon; consider splitting seed data + role provisioning into a sub-module before next feature addition.
supplier_catalog.py uses module-level in-memory `sync_history` list — not durable across worker restarts. Acceptable for demo, but flag for migration if multi-worker deployment is enabled.

help_agent.py /ask: when EMERGENT_LLM_KEY is unset OR LLM throws, fallback reply still returns 200 with non-empty reply (verified). The local variable `_err` is assigned but never logged — minor: route the error to a logger so silent LLM failures are observable in prod.

select-vendor falls back to in-memory only if Mongo write fails (try/except pass). If db is down, GET /vendor-selections returns empty — caller would not know the write was lost. Consider returning a 'persisted: bool' flag.
Role 'banquet_chef' creation auto-fills correctly, but the create_admin_user response does not include 'updated_at' (only created_at). Minor inconsistency vs update path.
test_credentials: Not required — onboarding/admin endpoints are open in preview env.
seed_data_creation: Test users created with email prefix `TEST_` and deleted in each test's teardown. One vendor selection (sku=SYS-001234, supplier=sysco) is upserted into supplier_vendor_selections — left in place because it is the canonical demo selection (idempotent upsert by sku).
context_for_next_testing_agent: test_iter273_help_onboarding_supplier.py covers: POST /api/help-agent/ask (LLM + fallback + tour-suggest for paystub); GET /api/admin/role-provisioning; POST /api/admin/users for banquet_chef→maestrobqt, finance→echo-aurum, unknown→staff(my-schedule); POST /apply-role-defaults to gm→daily-standup; GET /onboarding-bundle echo-back; GET /supplier-catalog/price-history/SYS-001234 (≥20 points, low/high/avg/trend_pct, anchor); GET /supplier-catalog/outlet-usage/SYS-005678 (5 outlets, rank, share_pct, series); POST /select-vendor + GET /vendor-selections persistence; GET /echoaurion-409a-evidence-pack.pdf (200 + >1MB). All endpoints curl/pytest verified working at external preview URL. LLM Q&A latency ~2-4s per call — bumped timeout to 60s.
rca of the issue: N/A — no failures detected in this iteration.
